Help and Advice

Council services

Most services are provided by:

Cheshire West and Chester Council

Cheshire East Council

​

Some services, such as parks, play areas, cemeteries, allotments or town centre events may be provided by your town or parish council.

​

Northwich | Winsford | Middlewich | Rudheath | Kingsmead | Hartford | Davenham and Bostock | Moulton | Whitegate and Marton

Mental health

If you think you are at risk of putting yourself in immediate danger please call 999 or go to A&E.

​

Crisis support

0800 145 6485

Text 'SHOUT' to 85258

​

Samaritans

116 123 (free from any UK number)

jo@samaritans.org

​

Mid Cheshire Mind

01606 863 305

office@midcheshiremind.org.uk

​

You in Mind

​

Salt Men Confidential

A Natural Health Service project from The Mersey Forest.

​

Men in Sheds

​

Directions for Men

​

Motherwell CIO

Domestic violence

Dial 999 if you’ve been threatened or attacked and require urgent assistance.

​

Cheshire Without Abuse

0300 123 5101

​

Rape and Sexual Abuse Support Centre

0330 363 0063

Housing and homelessness

In Northwich and Winsford:

West Cheshire Homes

westcheshirehomes@cheshirewestandchester.gov.uk

​

Report rough sleeping

​​

Citizens Advice Cheshire West

0808 278 7806

​

In Middlewich:

Cheshire Home Choice

0300 123 5017 option 1

cheshirehomechoice@cheshireeast.gov.uk

​

Report rough sleeping

​

​Citizens Advice Cheshire East

0808 812 6186

​

National

Shelter
0808 800 4444
